name: us-local-life-advisor
description: US local life decision support using hosted structured local data.

interface.shortDescription: Answer US local life questions with grounded local data and concise recommendations.
interface.longDescription: Public beta plugin for data-grounded US local life decision support. Helps evaluate US cities, neighborhoods, addresses, and everyday local choices using hosted structured local data plus careful synthesis.
defaultPrompt: Help me evaluate a US city, neighborhood, address, or local decision using local data.
